prompt: Create a square cinematic electronic music album cover on a pure black background. Center a single astronaut floating upright in space, full body visible, facing directly toward the viewer with arms slightly lowered and spread, legs together, and a realistic bulky white EVA suit with ribbed fabric, gloves, boots, chest control panel, hoses, and backpack life-support unit. The helmet should be glossy white with a reflective gold visor, no face visible. Add a strong white rim light and soft halo glow around the astronaut, especially behind the helmet and suit edges, while keeping the surrounding space nearly empty with only subtle black texture and no stars. Place minimalist typography at the top center: large widely spaced uppercase title text ALIGN in thin futuristic white sans-serif letters with a faint glow, and directly underneath it smaller spaced uppercase artist text PZF. Keep the composition symmetrical, high contrast, premium sci-fi, dark ambient, clean and uncluttered, with the astronaut occupying the central lower half and the title occupying the upper third. No extra objects, no planets, no watermark, no additional text.
